message.content:
@startuml
title Temperature Sensor A internal sequence

skinparam sequence {
  BackgroundColor #E0E0E0
  ArrowColor #000000
  ActorBorderColor #000000
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #000000
}

participant "Internal Sequence" as IS
participant "getSignal" as GS
participant "AD conversion" as ADC
participant "signal processing" as SP

activate IS
IS -> GS : start
activate GS
GS -> ADC
activate ADC
ADC -> SP
activate SP
SP --> ADC
deactivate SP
ADC --> GS
deactivate ADC
GS --> IS : end
deactivate GS
deactivate IS

@enduml
